outcome.title: Diff Quot
outcome.description: Evaluate and simplify the difference quotient.

outcome.title: Graph Log
outcome.description: Identify and apply transformations (logarithmic function).

outcome.title: Solve Exp Log Eq
outcome.description: Solve exponential and logarithmic equations.

outcome.title: Log ID
outcome.description: Use logarithm identities to determine the exact value of the expression.

outcome.title: Right Tri (No Inv)
outcome.description: Solve a right triangle (not requiring inverse trigonometry).

outcome.title: Verify ID
outcome.description: Verify the given identity.

outcome.title: Solve Trig Eq
outcome.description: Solve a linear trigonometric equation.

outcome.title: Oblique Tri (SSA 2)
outcome.description: Solve an oblique triangle using the Law of Sines (Ambiguous 2).

outcome.title: Tri Apps (SSS Area)
outcome.description: Solve an oblique triangle using the Law of Sines (Ambiguous 2).

outcome.title: Elim Parameter
outcome.description: Eliminate the parameter of the pair of parametric equations.

outcome.title: Limits
outcome.description: Determine limits analytically.

outcome.title: Graph Rational
outcome.description: Graph a rational function given its characteristics.

outcome.title: Unit Circle Values
outcome.description: Give exact values for trigonometric functions evaluated at angles from the unit circle.

outcome.title: Unit Circle Backwards
outcome.description: Give exact angle solutions for trigonometric function values from the unit circle.

outcome.title: Graph Trig
outcome.description: Graph a transformed trigonometric function given its characteristics.

outcome.title: Find DA from Clues
outcome.description: Use a double-angle identity to find the exact value of a trigonometric function.

outcome.title: Trig Sub
outcome.description: Write a composition of trigonometric functions as an algebraic expression.

outcome.title: Solve Trig Eq - Quad
outcome.description: Solve a quadratic trigonometric equation.

outcome.title: Solve Inverse Trig Eq
outcome.description: Solve an inverse trigonometric equation.

outcome.title: Plot and Convert Polar Coordinates
outcome.description: Plot a point in polar coordinates and convert between polar and rectangular coordinates.

outcome.title: Limits Graph
outcome.description: Evaluate limits from the graph of a function.
